topic: England Wins Series-Deciding 3rd ODI Against India
headline: ENGLAND SEALS 2-1 SERIES VICTORY OVER INDIA WITH THRILLING 27-RUN WIN IN SERIES-DECIDING 3RD ODI AT LORD'S
summary: England won the third and final ODI against India by 27 runs, securing a 2-1 series victory. England set a record ODI total at Lord's with 387-3, thanks to Ben Duckett's 141 and contributions from Jacob Bethell and Joe Root. India scored 360-7 in response, with Rohit Sharma scoring 138, but fell short of the target. The win marked England's 18th victory over India at Lord's across all formats. England's Sam Curran took 4-75 to help his team seal the series.
